nodes.label: Sanad Invoices Screen (Screenshot)
nodes.description: UI screenshot of the Invoices (الفواتير) view in the Sanad legal PWA. Shows Arabic RTL layout with green primary color scheme, four financial KPI summary cards (total invoices, overdue amount, paid this month, outstanding), a filter tab bar, and a sortable invoice table. Two sample invoices visible: INV-2026-001 (Sent, Al-Khalij Pharmacies, 2,118 SAR) and INV-2026-002 (Paid, Al-Faisaliyah Group, 1,955 SAR). Left sidebar navigation is active on Invoices item. Role toggle (Student/Lawyer) and language toggle (EN) visible in header. PWA install prompt shown in footer. Bottom status bar reads: 'Sanad — Daily Operations Dashboard for Lawyers and Small Firms in Saudi Arabia'.

nodes.label: Invoices View (الفواتير)
nodes.description: The billing and invoicing module of the Sanad app. Converts billable hours into invoices and tracks payments. Provides KPI summary cards, filter tabs (All, Draft, Sent, Paid, Overdue), and an invoice table with columns for number, client, case, issue date, due date, total, and remaining balance.

properties.subtitle: حوّل ساعاتك القابلة للفوترة إلى فواتير وتتبع المدفوعات

nodes.label: Invoice Financial KPI Cards
nodes.description: Four summary cards displayed at the top of the Invoices view: (1) Total Invoices count (2), (2) Overdue/Unpaid amount highlighted in red/pink (1,175 SAR), (3) Paid This Month highlighted in green (1,955 SAR), (4) Outstanding count (1) with total amount (2,118 SAR). Color coding communicates financial health at a glance.

nodes.label: Invoice List Table
nodes.description: Table of invoices in the Invoices view. Each row shows invoice number, client, linked case, issue date, due date, total amount, and remaining balance with a status badge. Status badges include: فرسلة (Sent, blue), مدفوعة (Paid, green). Rows have a three-dot action menu on the left.

nodes.label: Sanad Sidebar Navigation
nodes.description: Left sidebar navigation present in the Sanad app. Contains links to: Dashboard (لوحة التحكم), Clients (العملاء), Cases Board (لوحة القضايا), Communications (الاتصالات), Documents (المستندات), Invoices (الفواتير - active), Compliance (الامتثال, badge:4), Tasks (المهام, badge:9), Deep Work (العمل العميق), Calendar (التقويم). Badge counts on Compliance and Tasks indicate pending items.

nodes.label: Sanad PWA Feature
nodes.description: The Sanad app is built as a Progressive Web App (PWA). A footer prompt encourages installation on the desktop for daily access. A status line notes that the timer and UI state are saved locally with minimal server load. Bottom status bar confirms: 'Optimized for home server • PWA enabled'.

properties.install_prompt: مثبّت كتطبيق PWA. ثبّته على سطح المكتب للوصول اليومي.
properties.local_storage_note: المؤقت والواجهة محفوظة محليًا — عبء خادم ضائل.

nodes.label: Sanad Role Toggle (Student/Lawyer)
nodes.description: Header UI element allowing the user to switch between Student (طالب) and Lawyer (محامي) roles. In this screenshot, Lawyer mode is active. Also includes a language toggle (EN/Arabic) and a refresh button. User avatar is shown in the top-left corner.
